data.title: MSC Industrial eyes website upgrades after ecommerce downturn
data.description: The big MRO and metalworking distributor says its flagship MSCDirect.com ecommerce site’s improvements are on course for the coming months, following recent declines in ecommerce and total revenue.

data.title: Too much digital competition drives American Tire into bankruptcy
data.description: The company’s liquidity challenges left it vulnerable to the post-pandemic volatility of the tire and auto parts market, according to court filings in Delaware and Reuters

data.title: Online retailers recognize impact of sustainability, social concerns on business
data.description: Brands weigh the impact of reducing emissions and overall sustainability efforts on their bottom lines and customer loyalty.

data.title: Buybuy Baby closing stores to go fully digital
data.description: The company's closings come as buybuy Baby's former sister brand Bed Bath & Beyond prepares to return to physical retail stores.

data.title: Kirkland’s and Beyond partner to pave Bed Bath & Beyond's return to physical stores
data.description: Beyond plans to invest $25 million through a combined debt and equity transaction as Kirkland's becomes a licensee for new small-format Bed Bath & Beyond locations.
